base_context.description: The next run will be this leader/base config plus ONLY the JSON changes returned by the advisor.

expected_direction: increase net profit or PnL per exposure hour without worsening MAE
expected_effect: Should improve stale/no-0DTE fallback PnL per exposure hour and reduce hidden MAE/hold-time drag while leaving the 78 VALID_0DTE trades untouched. Tradeoff is possible loss of the single EXPIRED_0DTE convex winner or fewer fallback trades; reject if total net profit drops below 98% of run_044, fallback expectancy turns negative, or VALID_0DTE attribution changes materially.
label: no-0dte-breakout-realization-tighten
rationale: Use exactly one legal family: batch_g_missing_0dte_policy_adapted. The leader base is already strong, so the next experiment should avoid broad veto tightening and avoid disturbing the core VALID_0DTE engines. The cleanest remaining inefficiency is data-state-specific: STALE_0DTE fallback is positive but weak and slow, while VALID_0DTE and VALID_1DTE_ONLY carry the system. This tests whether the no-0DTE breakout fallback should be more momentum-confirmed and faster to realize when option confirmation is unavailable.
